title: euphorbia lucida
intro: Euphorbia lucida, also known as the shining spurge, is a species of succulent plant in the Euphorbiaceae family. It is a shrub-like plant that is native to tropical Africa, with a number of medicinal properties attributed to its leaves, roots, and latex. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Euphorbia lucida can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide health benefits.
